suppress.notes: We do not expose a SMTP interface

False positive: CVE applies to Nu HTML Checker (validator.nu). hibernate-validator-9.0.1.Final does not contain nu.validator classes (inspected on 2026-01-29). Investigation: dependency-check matched a generic "validator" CPE. Rationale: suppress to avoid noise; will revisit if package is updated or new evidence appears. Investigated-by: Michael Estebanez
